channel.title: Machine Learning on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Frank Huang

item.title: My thougts about Linear Regression
item.description: Suppose we have a spark-submit kept showing: yarn.Client: Application report for application (state: ACCEPTED) spark 参数配置 –conf -> shell parameter -> conf/spark-defaults.conf spark.yarn.am.memory increase the yarn cluster max threshold set yarn-site.xml yarn.scheduler.maximum-allocation-mb yarn 对应node manager 和 TMUX usage cheetsheet resize pane size(down move 2 lines): ctrl+b : resize-pane -D 2 Start new named session: tmux new -s [session name] Detach from session: ctrl+b d
